features.name: enum typedef with identical field names across different types
features.description: Code should include two different enum typedef declarations that have identical enum field names
features.snippet:
typedef enum {A, B} M2_state_t;
typedef enum {A, B} M1_state_t;

features.name: enum value assignment between types with shared field names
features.description: Code should include assignment or comparison operations between enum variables of different types that share identical field names
